en: Finchek, who knows what round, but do it with me and tell me how you say the following words.
ko: 핀첵, 몇 라운드인지 모르겠지만, 나랑 같이 하면서 다음 단어들을 어떻게 발음하는지 말해줘.

en: I am from eastern Kentucky in the Appalachian Mountains. Where are you from? I'm from Wisconsin.
ko: 나는 동부 켄터키 애팔래치아 산맥 출신이야. 넌 어디서 왔어? 위스콘신에서 왔어.

en: Let's go. Yogurt. Yogurt. Crisp. Crisp. Aluminum. Aluminum. Oregano. Oregano. Theater. Theater.
ko: 가자. Yogurt. Yogurt. Crisp. Crisp. Aluminum. Aluminum. Oregano. Oregano. Theater. Theater.

en: Progress. Progress. Foil. Foil. Airplane. Airplane. Tuesday. Tuesday. Herb. Herb. Basil.
ko: Progress. Progress. Foil. Foil. Airplane. Airplane. Tuesday. Tuesday. Herb. Herb. Basil.

en: Basil. Vitamin. Vitamin. Bald. Bald. Lion. Lion. Lion. Lion. Lion. Thanks for playing along.
ko: Basil. Vitamin. Vitamin. Bald. Bald. Lion. Lion. Lion. Lion. Lion. 같이 해줘서 고마워.
